questions.text: Which part of the plant absorbs water?
questions.explanation: Roots absorb water and minerals from the soil. Root hairs increase the surface area for absorption.

questions.text: Photosynthesis occurs in the leaves of plants.
questions.explanation: Photosynthesis mainly occurs in leaves where chlorophyll captures sunlight energy.

questions.text: What is the function of stomata?
questions.correctAnswer: Stomata allow gas exchange and transpiration in leaves.
questions.explanation: Stomata are tiny pores that allow CO₂ intake for photosynthesis and water vapor release.

questions.text: The green pigment in plants is called ________.
questions.explanation: Chlorophyll is the green pigment that captures light energy for photosynthesis.
